summary: Start the R0 read-only audit of production entrypoints, fixture/test/demo paths, no-op command surfaces, and client-runtime integration gaps from origin/main 7878027f. No product code or R1 task creation is authorized.

tests_run.result: Exactly two worktrees remain: isolated retained M7 evidence and the reused RR0 worktree.

decisions.decision: Reuse the existing RR0 worktree and remove the merged closure branch locally and remotely before starting this task.
Use one systems_architect writer and reserve an independent qa_reviewer slot; do not parallelize this repository-wide audit.

risks.summary: Static call-site evidence can misclassify test fixtures as production behavior; every matrix row must cite a concrete entrypoint and distinguish fact from inference.

requested_action: Produce a scoped audit matrix under project/audits, update only allowed process artifacts, emit a schema-valid REVIEW handoff to qa_reviewer, and stop without modifying product code or creating R1 tasks.
